text_raw: I pray he returns soon...
text_clean: I pray he returns soon...

text_raw: I should've told him not to go...
text_clean: I should've told him not to go...

text_raw: I hope he's safe and sound...
text_clean: I hope he's safe and sound...

text_raw: My husband serves in the Hernandian Guard.
text_clean: My husband serves in the Hernandian Guard.

text_raw: He was dispatched to the north gate a few days back.
text_clean: He was dispatched to the north gate a few days back.

text_raw: But I've received no word from him since.
text_clean: But I've received no word from him since.

text_raw: I heard that lately, those sent there hardly ever make it back.
text_clean: I heard that lately, those sent there hardly ever make it back.

text_raw: I spend every night tossing and turning with worry.
text_clean: I spend every night tossing and turning with worry.

text_raw: If you're headed north, could you find him and give him this letter?
text_clean: If you're headed north, could you find him and give him this letter?

text_raw: Ugh...
text_clean: Ugh...

text_raw: Greymane...?
text_clean: Greymane...?

text_raw: I ran into some poachers while scouting the area.
text_clean: I ran into some poachers while scouting the area.

text_raw: My comrades and I fled when they started shooting at us... But then...
text_clean: My comrades and I fled when they started shooting at us... But then...

text_raw: we ran into a pack of wolves.
text_clean: we ran into a pack of wolves.

text_raw: They're still... nearby.
text_clean: They're still... nearby.

text_raw: Fucking fangs... fucking... bullets...
text_clean: Fucking fangs... fucking... bullets...

text_raw: I've got to deal with the situation soon...
text_clean: I've got to deal with the situation soon...

text_raw: First the wolves, and now the poachers... Just what I needed.
text_clean: First the wolves, and now the poachers... Just what I needed.

text_raw: You need something from me?
text_clean: You need something from me?

text_raw: Shit! I'm losing my mind here!
text_clean: Shit! I'm losing my mind here!

text_raw: There's a vicious pack of wolves roaming about lately.
text_clean: There's a vicious pack of wolves roaming about lately.

text_raw: I tell you, these wolves—especially the leader—are no ordinary beasts.
text_clean: I tell you, these wolves—especially the leader—are no ordinary beasts.

text_raw: And don't even get me started on those bloody poachers.
text_clean: And don't even get me started on those bloody poachers.

text_raw: They're shooting anything that moves, driving the wolves into a right frenzy!
text_clean: They're shooting anything that moves, driving the wolves into a right frenzy!

text_raw: Ugh... On top of that, I haven't heard from the scouts that went south!
text_clean: Ugh... On top of that, I haven't heard from the scouts that went south!

text_raw: So, I've got to sort out this mess before looking into the missing soldiers.
text_clean: So, I've got to sort out this mess before looking into the missing soldiers.

text_raw: I'm here about the missing soldiers.

text_raw: I'll finally go home...
text_clean: I'll finally go home...

text_raw: I don't think so.
text_clean: I don't think so.

text_raw: Huh? You're serious? Could I take a look?
text_clean: Huh? You're serious? Could I take a look?

text_raw: I recognize this handwriting... it's my wife's!
text_clean: I recognize this handwriting... it's my wife's!

text_raw: I was worried I wouldn't make it back, but all is well now.

text_raw: and the poachers have vanished as well.

text_raw: Since everything's under control now, I can't wait to go back home.

text_raw: You the courier we're waiting on?
